title: Detect A cycle in a Directed Graph using BFS

content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Detect A cycle in a Directed Graph using BFS". Refer to LeetCode description: https://leetcode.com/problems/course-schedule/
content.inputFormat: The input will be a 2D array of integers, where each integer array represents a directed edge in the graph. The first integer in each array represents the source node, and the second integer represents the destination node.
content.outputFormat: The output will be a boolean value indicating whether a cycle is present in the graph.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: To detect a cycle in a directed graph using BFS, we can use a topological sorting approach. If we can't topologically sort the graph, then it contains a cycle.
